items.title: Klaasen continues to be 'Mr Consistent', while 'stronger base' lifts Head's game
items.summary: Travis Head, with a 30-ball 76, and Heinrich Klaasen, with an unbeaten 30-ball 65, played big roles as Sunrisers Hyderabad chased down Mumbai Indians' 243 with eight balls in hand
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
